proposed_hypotheses.text: Cell lines with `feature_009 == 1` have more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than cell lines with `feature_009 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_022 == 1` have more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than cell lines with `feature_022 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_024 == 1` have more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than cell lines with `feature_024 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_014 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than cell lines with `feature_014 == 0`.
Cell lines with `feature_027 == 1` have more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than cell lines with `feature_027 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_009 == 1` had mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8047 versus -0.2495 in all other lines; difference -0.5552.
`feature_022 == 1` had mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6010 versus -0.2524 in all other lines; difference -0.3486.
`feature_024 == 1` had mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.6856 versus -0.2535 in all other lines; difference -0.4321.
`feature_014 == 1` had mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5594 versus -0.2520 in all other lines; difference -0.3075.
`feature_027 == 1` had mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.3527 versus -0.2572 in all other lines; difference -0.0955.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The `feature_011 == "skin"` and `feature_009 == 1` subgroup has more negative `dependency_BRAF` scores than other cell lines.
The `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` and `feature_024 == 1` subgroup has more negative `dependency_ERBB2` scores than other cell lines.
The `feature_011 == "pancreatic"` and `feature_014 == 1` subgroup has more negative `dependency_KRAS` scores than other cell lines.
The `feature_022 == 1` and high `feature_016` subgroup (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) has more negative `dependency_EGFR` scores than other cell lines.
The `feature_011 == "brain"` and `feature_027 == 1` subgroup has more negative `dependency_RIT1` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011 == "skin" AND feature_009 == 1` had n=1966, mean `dependency_BRAF` -0.8114 versus -0.2909 in other lines; difference -0.5205.
`feature_010 == "her2_enriched" AND feature_024 == 1` had n=142, mean `dependency_ERBB2` -0.7525 versus -0.2944 in other lines; difference -0.4581.
`feature_011 == "pancreatic" AND feature_014 == 1` had n=2913, mean `dependency_KRAS` -0.5591 versus -0.3103 in other lines; difference -0.2488.
`feature_022 == 1 AND feature_016 >= 1.088` had n=393, mean `dependency_EGFR` -0.6474 versus -0.2765 in other lines; difference -0.3709.
`feature_011 == "brain" AND feature_027 == 1` had n=329, mean `dependency_RIT1` -0.4047 versus -0.2650 in other lines; difference -0.1397.

proposed_hypotheses.text: High `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) marks cell lines with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
High `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) marks cell lines with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
High `feature_016` (`feature_016 >= 1.088`) marks cell lines with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
High `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 1.003`) marks cell lines with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016 >= 1.088` had n=5002, mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.5281 versus -0.4070 in other lines; difference -0.1211.
`feature_016 >= 1.088` had n=5002, mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.3727 versus -0.3293 in other lines; difference -0.0433.
`feature_016 >= 1.088` had n=5002, mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.2906 versus -0.2499 in other lines; difference -0.0407.
`feature_003 >= 1.003` had n=5011, mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3831 versus -0.2573 in other lines; difference -0.1257.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_011 == "colorectal"` cell lines have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than non-colorectal cell lines.
Cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 1.427`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than cell lines with `feature_035 == 0`.
Cell lines with high `feature_017` (`feature_017 >= 4.292`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011 == "colorectal"` had n=5816, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.7204 versus -0.2524 in other lines; difference -0.4680.
`feature_028 >= 1.427` had n=5009, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.6463 versus -0.2690 in other lines; difference -0.3773.
`feature_035 == 1` had n=9285, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.5447 versus -0.2526 in other lines; difference -0.2921.
`feature_017 >= 4.292` had n=5003, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.4562 versus -0.2902 in other lines; difference -0.1660.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_011 == "colorectal"` cell lines with high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 1.427`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
`feature_011 == "colorectal"` cell lines with `feature_035 == 1` have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
Cell lines with both `feature_035 == 1` and high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 1.427`) have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_028 >= 1.427` had n=2454, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.0650 versus -0.2677 in other lines; difference -0.7973.
`feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_035 == 1` had n=3925, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.9425 versus -0.2527 in other lines; difference -0.6899.
`feature_035 == 1 AND feature_028 >= 1.427` had n=3182, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.8714 versus -0.2685 in other lines; difference -0.6029.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The complete subgroup `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_035 == 1` has markedly more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than all other cell lines.
Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_028 >= 1.427` cell lines, `feature_020 == 0` enables stronger `dependency_KIF18A` dependency than `feature_020 == 1`.
Within `feature_011 == "colorectal"` and `feature_028 >= 1.427` cell lines, `feature_035 == 1` enables stronger `dependency_KIF18A` dependency than `feature_035 == 0`.

analyses.result_summary: The four-predicate subgroup had n=1732, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.3952 versus -0.2678 in all other lines; difference -1.1274.
Among colorectal high-`feature_028` lines, the `feature_020 == 0` group had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.2409 versus -0.2642 for `feature_020 == 1`; contrast -0.9767.
Among colorectal high-`feature_028` lines, the `feature_035 == 1` group had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -1.1961 versus -0.2849 for `feature_035 == 0`; contrast -0.9112.

proposed_hypotheses.text: `feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_026 >= 1.153` together mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_TMED10` scores than other cell lines.
`feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_023 >= 6.330` together mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_DHX9` scores than other cell lines.
`feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_003 >= 1.003` together mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_POLR2A` scores than other cell lines.
`feature_003 >= 1.003` and `feature_018 == 1` together mark cell lines with more negative `dependency_RPL11` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: `feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_026 >= 1.153` had n=490, mean `dependency_TMED10` -0.3424 versus -0.2531 in other lines; difference -0.0893.
`feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_023 >= 6.330` had n=571, mean `dependency_DHX9` -0.4174 versus -0.3327 in other lines; difference -0.0847.
`feature_016 >= 1.088 AND feature_003 >= 1.003` had n=717, mean `dependency_POLR2A` -0.5518 versus -0.4171 in other lines; difference -0.1347.
`feature_003 >= 1.003 AND feature_018 == 1` had n=4919, mean `dependency_RPL11` -0.3845 versus -0.2574 in other lines; difference -0.1271.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Outside `feature_011 == "colorectal"` cell lines, high `feature_028` (`feature_028 >= 1.427`) does not produce more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores.
The subgroup `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, and `feature_020 == 1` has less negative, not more negative, `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.
The subgroup `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, and `feature_035 == 0` does not have more negative `dependency_KIF18A` scores than other cell lines.

analyses.result_summary: Outside colorectal lines, high `feature_028` had mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2442 versus -0.2529 for lower `feature_028`; contrast +0.0087, not significant.

`feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_028 >= 1.427 AND feature_020 == 1` had n=442, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2642 versus -0.3072 in other lines; difference +0.0430, opposite the stronger-dependency direction.
`feature_011 == "colorectal" AND feature_028 >= 1.427 AND feature_035 == 0` had n=353, mean `dependency_KIF18A` -0.2849 versus -0.3070 in other lines; difference +0.0221, not significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: A systematic feature-by-feature heterogeneity screen recovers `feature_009 == 1` as the dominant `dependency_BRAF` subgroup, with minor refinement by other predicates but no stronger biological subgroup than the single feature.
A systematic feature-by-feature heterogeneity screen recovers `feature_022 == 1` as the dominant `dependency_EGFR` subgroup, with high `feature_016` as a modest enhancer.
A systematic feature-by-feature heterogeneity screen recovers `feature_024 == 1` as the dominant `dependency_ERBB2` subgroup, with `feature_010 == "her2_enriched"` as a small enhancer.
A systematic feature-by-feature heterogeneity screen recovers `feature_014 == 1` as the dominant `dependency_KRAS` subgroup, with lineage terms adding limited extra concentration.

analyses.result_summary: The best BRAF pair/triple screen retained `feature_009 == 1`; examples such as `feature_009 == 1 AND feature_030 == 0` had n=5200, mean -0.8055 versus -0.2540, difference -0.5514, essentially matching the single-feature effect.
The EGFR screen selected `feature_022 == 1 AND feature_016 >= 1.088`; n=393, mean -0.6474 versus -0.2765, difference -0.3709.
The ERBB2 screen selected `feature_024 == 1 AND feature_010 == "her2_enriched"`; n=142, mean -0.7525 versus -0.2944, difference -0.4581.
The KRAS screen retained `feature_014 == 1`; the pancreatic subgroup had n=2913, mean -0.5591 versus -0.3103, difference -0.2488, which was weaker than the single-feature contrast.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The best-supported `dependency_KIF18A` subgroup is exactly `feature_011 == "colorectal"`, `feature_028 >= 1.427`, `feature_020 == 0`, and `feature_035 == 1`, with much more negative scores than all other lines.
The best-supported `dependency_TMED10` subgroup from the systematic heterogeneity search is `feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_026 >= 1.153`, with more negative scores than all other lines.
The best-supported `dependency_DHX9` subgroup from the systematic heterogeneity search is `feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_023 >= 6.330`, with more negative scores than all other lines.
The best-supported `dependency_POLR2A` subgroup from the systematic heterogeneity search is `feature_016 >= 1.088` and `feature_003 >= 1.003`, with more negative scores than all other lines.

The best-supported `dependency_RPL11` subgroup from the systematic heterogeneity search is high `feature_003` (`feature_003 >= 1.003`), with `feature_018 == 1` preserving slightly more negative scores.

analyses.result_summary: Final KIF18A subgroup: n=1732, mean -1.3952 versus -0.2678 in all other lines; the other colorectal/high-`feature_028` cells without both enabling predicates remained near baseline.
Final TMED10 subgroup: n=490, mean -0.3424 versus -0.2531; difference -0.0893.
Final DHX9 subgroup: n=571, mean -0.4174 versus -0.3327; difference -0.0847.
Final POLR2A subgroup: n=717, mean -0.5518 versus -0.4171; difference -0.1347.
Final RPL11 subgroup: `feature_003 >= 1.003 AND feature_018 == 1` had n=4919, mean -0.3845 versus -0.2574; difference -0.1271.
